mapper.sql: fx_rate_no, currency_code, buy_rate, sell_rate, base_rate, announced_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO exchange_rates ( fx_rate_no, currency_code, buy_rate, sell_rate, base_rate, announced_at ) VALUES ( SEQ_EXCHANGE_RATES.NEXTVAL, #{currency_code}, #{buy_rate}, #{sell_rate}, #{base_rate}, SYSTIMESTAMP )
mapper.select: SELECT FROM ( SELECT er.*, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY currency_code ORDER BY announced_at DESC) rn FROM exchange_rates er ) WHERE rn = 1 ORDER BY currency_code
SELECT FROM exchange_rates ORDER BY announced_at DESC, currency_code
SELECT FROM exchange_rates WHERE currency_code = #{currencyCode} ORDER BY announced_at DESC
